input.command:
git add -A && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Implement agent-controlled extraction and direct entity creation tools

- Remove automatic extraction from chat-processor; orchestrator now controls entity creation
- Add create_question tool (orchestrator) for decision-requiring questions
- Add create_work_item tool (PM agent) for direct task/feature creation
- Extend PM agent suggest_work_items to support project kind creation
- Update work-item-accept route to create projects when needed
- Add helper functions createQuestionRecord and createProjectRecord to queries
- Refactor test suite: pipeline validates agent-driven decisions, onboarding expects orchestrator response, extraction-quality focuses on quality not format
- This completes Phase 4 of the extraction refactor: moving from always-on extraction to agent-controlled creation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

content.thinking: The diff is very large, so it's been saved to a file. That's fine - I have enough context from the workspace diff statistics and the system context to understand what's been changed. Now let me create the PR using `gh pr create`.

input.command:
gh pr create --title "Move extraction from always-on to agent-controlled (#70)" --base main --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

Implement Phase 4 of the extraction refactor: move entity creation from automatic extraction on every message to agent-controlled creation via orchestrator and PM agent tools.

- **Removal**: Auto-extraction from chat-processor; extraction now only happens on document ingestion
- **Orchestrator Tools**: Add `create_question` for decision-requiring questions (not informational queries)
- **PM Agent Tools**: Add `create_work_item` for direct task/feature/project creation; extend suggest_work_items to support project kind
- **Graph Persistence**: Extraction output collected from agent tool executions instead of standalone LLM call
- **Tests**: Refactor smoke tests to validate agent-controlled entity creation; pipeline test verifies decision language creates entities, onboarding test expects orchestrator response, extraction quality test focuses on behavior not format

This completes the move toward agent-controlled entity extraction while maintaining the same SSE event structure for the frontend (extraction event populated from collectedEntities).

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

EOF
)"

content.thinking: Perfect! The PR has been created successfully. Let me provide the user with the PR URL and a summary of what was done.

content.text:
✅ **PR created successfully!**

**PR #76:** [Move extraction from always-on to agent-controlled (#70)](https://github.com/marcus-sa/brain/pull/76)

## Summary of Changes

This PR implements Phase 4 of the extraction refactor, transitioning from automatic extraction on every user message to agent-controlled entity creation:

**Key Changes:**
- Removed automatic extraction from chat-processor; orchestrator now controls when entities are created
- Added `create_question` tool for the orchestrator to create decision-requiring questions (not informational queries)
- Added `create_work_item` tool for PM agent to directly create tasks, features, or projects
- Extended `suggest_work_items` to support project kind creation
- Updated work-item-accept route to handle project creation
- Added helper functions (`createQuestionRecord`, `createProjectRecord`) to graph queries
- Refactored all smoke tests to validate the new agent-controlled flow

**17 files changed, 750 insertions(+), 279 deletions(-)**
